title: queltia jonquilla
intro: Queltia jonquilla, also known as the queen's cup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. The medicinal properties of Queltia jonquilla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Queltia jonquilla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
